name: Kiri Dodol
recipeInstructions:
1. Sieve the rice flour into a bowl.
2. Chop the cashewnuts and grate the jaggery.
3. Add the cinnamon, salt, palm sugar, and coconut milk to the flour mixture. Mix well until combined.
4. Gradually incorporate the coconut milk into the mixture while stirring continuously.
5. Place the mixture in a pan and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until it thickens.
6. Once thickened, add the chopped cashewnuts and mix thoroughly.
7. Transfer the mixture to a flat, buttered dish. Smooth the surface.
8. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
9. When cooled, cut into diamond-shaped pieces.
